abstract.text: Receipt of RZV during admission to a skilled-nursing facility or within 12 months was associated with lower dementia risk.
abstract.textZh: 在進入專業護理機構期間或 12 個月內接受 RZV 與較低的失智症風險相關。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: GlaxoSmithKline.

articles.title: Pharmacologic Treatments With Lifestyle Modifications in Nonpregnant Adults With Overweight or Obesity in Outpatient Settings: A Living Clinical Guideline From the American College of Physicians (April 2026)
articles.authors: Qaseem A, Cross JT, Harrod CS, Owens DK, Balk EM, Crandall CJ, Clinical Guidelines Committee of the American College of Physicians

abstract.label: DESCRIPTION
abstract.text: The American College of Physicians (ACP) developed this clinical guideline for internal medicine physicians and other clinicians caring in outpatient settings for adults with overweight or obesity.
abstract.textZh: 美國內科醫師學會 (ACP) 為內科醫生和其他在門診治療超重或肥胖成人的臨床醫生製定了本臨床指南。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: This guideline is based on systematic reviews of pharmacologic treatments in adults with overweight or obesity and used the GRADE (Grading of Recommendations Assessment, Development and Evaluation) approach.
abstract.textZh: 本指引是基於對超重或肥胖成人藥物治療的系統性評價，並使用 GRADE（建議評估、制定和評估分級）方法。

abstract.label: RECOMMENDATION 1
abstract.text: ACP suggests initiating one of the following pharmacologic treatments with lifestyle modifications for weight management in nonpregnant adults with obesity (body mass index ≥30 kg/m2) in outpatient settings (conditional recommendation): First-line treatments are semaglutide (moderate-certainty evidence) and tirzepatide (moderate-certainty evidence); second-line treatment is phentermine-topiramate (low-certainty evidence); third-line treatment is liraglutide (low-certainty evidence); fourth-line treatment is naltrexone-bupropion (low-certainty evidence). When initiating a recommended medication for weight management or switching to another recommended medication because of an inadequate response, clinicians and patients should discuss benefits, harms, costs, access and availability, clinical comorbidities, weight loss goals, life expectancy, values and preferences, and contraindications and warnings (for example, the requirement for monthly pregnancy tests with use of phentermine-topiramate, the contraindication to phentermine-topiramate in those with cardiovascular disease, and suicidal ideation with naltrexone-bupropion).
abstract.textZh: ACP 建議在門診環境中對非妊娠肥胖成人（體重指數≥30 kg/m2）開始以下藥物治療之一併調整生活方式來控制體重（有條件推薦）：一線治療是索馬魯肽（中等質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；二線治療是芬特明-托吡酯（低質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；二線治療是芬特明-托吡酯（低質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；二線治療是芬特明-托吡酯（低質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；當開始使用建議的體重管理藥物或因反應不足而改用另一種推薦藥物時，臨床醫生和患者應討論益處、危害、成本、可及性和可用性、臨床合併症、減肥目標、預期壽命、價值觀和偏好以及禁忌症和警告（例如，使用芬特明-托吡酯時每月進行妊娠試驗的要求、患有心血管疾病的患者使用芬特酮-托吡酸

abstract.label: RECOMMENDATION 2
abstract.text: ACP suggests initiating one of the following pharmacologic treatments with lifestyle modifications for weight management in nonpregnant adults with overweight (body mass index ≥27 to 30 kg/m2) and type 2 diabetes, dyslipidemia, hypertension, obstructive sleep apnea, or cardiovascular disease (conditional recommendation): First-line treatments are semaglutide (moderate-certainty evidence) and tirzepatide (moderate-certainty evidence); second-line treatment is liraglutide (low-certainty evidence). When initiating a recommended medication for weight management or switching to another recommended medication because of an inadequate response, clinicians and patients should discuss benefits, harms, costs, access and availability, clinical comorbidities, weight loss goals, life expectancy, values and preferences, and contraindications and warnings (for example, use in pregnancy).
abstract.textZh: ACP 建議對超重（體重指數≥27 至 30 kg/m2）和 2 型糖尿病、血脂異常、高血壓、阻塞性睡眠呼吸中止症或心血管疾病（有條件推薦）的非妊娠成人開始以下藥物治療之一，並調整生活方式來控制體重：一線治療是索馬魯肽（質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）；二線治療質量低肽（中等質量證據）和替澤帕肽（中等質量證據）。當開始使用建議的體重管理藥物或因反應不足而改用另一種建議的藥物時，臨床醫生和患者應討論益處、危害、成本、可及性和可用性、臨床合併症、減肥目標、預期壽命、價值觀和偏好以及禁忌症和警告（例如，在懷孕期間使用）。

articles.titleZh: 對門診超重或肥胖的非妊娠成年人進行生活方式改變的藥物治療：美國醫師學會的即時臨床指南（2026 年 4 月）

articles.title: Continuing Glucagon-Like Peptide-1 Receptor Agonists Into the First Trimester of Pregnancy and Pregnancy Outcomes : A Target Trial Emulation Study Using Claims Information
articles.authors: Brown JP, Huybrechts KF, Straub L, Patorno E, Seely EW, Bateman BT, Hernández-Díaz S

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonist (GLP-1RA) use has increased among women of reproductive age, but limited data exist on safety in pregnancy.
abstract.textZh: 胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑（ GLP-1RA ）在育齡婦女中的使用有所增加，但關於懷孕安全性的數據有限。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To estimate the risk for nonlive birth, abnormal fetal growth, and major congenital malformation (MCM) with GLP-1RA dispensing in early pregnancy.
abstract.textZh: 估計妊娠早期使用GLP-1RA進行非活產、胎兒異常生長和嚴重先天性畸形(MCM)的風險。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: In an observational cohort of pregnant women aged 16 to 55 years with a GLP-1RA dispensation in the 90 days before the last menstrual period (LMP), a target trial with 2 treatment strategies was emulated: continuation of dispensing into the first trimester (≥1 further dispensation), or noncontinuation.
abstract.textZh: 在最後一個月經期（ LMP ）前90天內有GLP-1RA分配的16至55歲孕婦的觀察隊列中，模擬了一項有2種治療策略的目標試驗：繼續分配到孕早期（ ≥ 1次進一步分配） ，或不繼續。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: Merative MarketScan U.S. insurance claims data (2011 to 2024).
abstract.textZh: Merative MarketScan美國保險理賠數據（ 2011年至2024年）。

abstract.label: PARTICIPANTS
abstract.text: 3572 pregnancies (41.1% [n = 1467] among women with type 2 diabetes).

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Risk for nonlive birth was estimated using a weighted Kaplan-Meier estimator. Among live-birth pregnancies linked to infants, the weighted prevalence of MCM, small for gestational age (SGA), and large for gestational age (LGA) was estimated.
abstract.textZh: 使用加權Kaplan-Meier估計器估計非活產的風險。在與嬰兒有關的活產懷孕中，估計了MCM的加權患病率，小於胎齡（ SGA ） ，大於胎齡（ LGA ）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: The weighted risk for nonlive birth was 29.7% with continuation and 27.1% with noncontinuation (adjusted risk ratio, 1.09 [95% CI, 0.98 to 1.23]). Among 2529 live-birth pregnancies, 1443 (57.1%) received at least 1 GLP-1RA dispensation after LMP and 1499 (829 continuers) were linked to an infant. Weighted prevalence ratios for continuation versus noncontinuation were 1.29 (CI, 0.82 to 2.06) for SGA, 1.08 (CI, 0.84 to 1.40) for LGA, and 1.21 (CI, 0.83 to 1.82) for MCM.
abstract.textZh: 繼續非活產的加權平均風險為29.7% ，不繼續非活產的加權平均風險為27.1% （調整後風險比， 1.09 [95% CI ， 0.98至1.23] ）。在2529例活產懷孕中， 1443例（ 57.1 ％ ）在LMP後接受了至少一次GLP-1RA分配， 1499例（ 829名繼續者）與嬰兒有關。繼續與不繼續的加權患病率比率為SGA為1.29 （ CI ， 0.82至2.06 ） ， LGA為1.08 （ CI ， 0.84至1.40 ） ， MCM為1.21 （ CI ， 0.83至1.82 ）。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Potential residual confounding by prior glycemic control.
abstract.textZh: 既往血糖控制的潛在殘留混淆。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Risks for nonlive birth, SGA, LGA, and MCM were not definitively higher with continuation of GLP-1RAs into early pregnancy. However, estimates for MCM and SGA were imprecise and were compatible with both no increased risk and clinically relevant differences in risk.
abstract.textZh: 非活產、SGA、LGA和MCM的風險在GLP-1RA持續到妊娠早期時並非明確更高。然而，對MCM和SGA的估計是不精確的，並且與沒有增加的風險和臨牀相關的風險差異相容。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: National Institutes of Health.
abstract.textZh: 國立衛生研究院。

articles.titleZh: 繼續胰高血糖素樣肽-1受體激動劑進入妊娠和妊娠結局的第一個三個月：使用聲明信息的靶向試驗模擬研究

articles.title: Estimating the Effect of Hospital Admission on Health Care Outcomes and Spending Among Persons With Dementia : A Quasi-experimental Study
articles.authors: Ikesu R, Mayeda ER, McGarry K, Nianogo RA, Ramirez CM, Tsugawa Y

abstract.label: BACKGROUND
abstract.text: Because transitions in care settings can be confusing for persons with dementia (PWD), hospital admissions can negatively affect their physical and cognitive function. However, the effect of hospital admissions on patient outcomes and health care spending remains largely unknown.
abstract.textZh: 由於護理環境的轉變可能會讓失智症患者（ PWD ）感到困惑，因此住院可能會對他們的身體和認知功能產生負面影響。然而，住院對患者結果和醫療保健支出的影響在很大程度上仍然未知。

abstract.label: OBJECTIVE
abstract.text: To estimate the effects of hospital admissions on health outcomes and health care spending among PWD.
abstract.textZh: 估計住院對殘疾人健康結果和醫療保健支出的影響。

abstract.label: DESIGN
abstract.text: Quasi-experimental instrumental variable method, using emergency physicians' admission propensity as the instrument.
abstract.textZh: 準實驗工具變量法，以急診醫師的入院傾向為工具。

abstract.label: SETTING
abstract.text: United States.
abstract.textZh: 美國

abstract.label: PATIENTS
abstract.text: Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries aged 66 years or older with dementia who visited an emergency department (ED) in 2017 to 2019.
abstract.textZh: 年滿66歲或以上患有失智症的Medicare收費服務受益人，於2017年至2019年期間前往急診室（ ED ）。

abstract.label: MEASUREMENTS
abstract.text: Death, inpatient days (excluding the index hospital admission), and health care spending (excluding the index ED visit and hospital admission) within 30 and 90 days of ED visits.
abstract.textZh: ED就診後30天和90天內的死亡、住院天數（不包括指標住院天數）和醫療保健支出（不包括指標ED就診和住院天數）。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: Among 872 085 ED visits (62.9% women; mean age, 83.1 years) included in the analysis, 482 208 (55.3%) resulted in hospital admission. There was no evidence that hospital admission was associated with 30-day mortality rate (adjusted risk difference, -2.6 percentage points [pp] [95% CI, -5.2 to 0.1 pp]) or inpatient days (adjusted difference, 0.1 days [CI, -0.2 to 0.5 days]). Hospital admission was associated with higher 30-day health care spending (adjusted difference, $2547 [CI, $1390 to $3703]). Patterns were similar for 90-day outcomes.
abstract.textZh: 在分析中包括的872 085次ED就診（ 62.9 ％婦女；平均年齡為83.1歲）中， 482 208 （ 55.3 ％ ）導致住院。沒有證據表明住院與30天死亡率（調整後的風險差異， -2.6個百分點[pp] [95% CI ， -5.2至0.1 pp] ）或住院天數（調整後的差異， 0.1天[CI ， -0.2至0.5天] ）有關。住院與較高的30天醫療保健支出相關（調整後的差異， $ 2547 [CI ， $ 1390至$ 3703] ）。90天結果的模式相似。

abstract.label: LIMITATION
abstract.text: Residual confounding.
abstract.textZh: 剩餘的混淆。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Among Medicare beneficiaries with dementia who visited an ED, there was no evidence that hospital admission was associated with mortality rates. Under conventional statistical criteria, an effect of hospital admissions between a 5.2-pp decrease and a 0.1-pp increase in 30-day mortality rates was highly compatible with the data. On the contrary, hospital admission was associated with higher health care spending.
abstract.textZh: 在訪問ED的Medicare失智症受益人中，沒有證據表明住院與死亡率有關。在傳統統計標準下，住院率在30天死亡率降低5.2pp和增加0.1pp之間的影響與數據高度相容。相反，住院與更高的醫療支出有關。

abstract.label: PRIMARY FUNDING SOURCE
abstract.text: None.
abstract.textZh: 無。

articles.titleZh: 估計入院對失智症患者醫療結果和支出的影響：準實驗研究

articles.title: Nausea and Vomiting During Pregnancy
articles.authors: Williamson B, Light KJ, Chapa H

abstract.text: Nausea and vomiting are some of the most common symptoms during pregnancy. Severity should be assessed with a tool such as the Pregnancy-Unique Quantification of Emesis and Nausea (PUQE) score. In severe cases, additional medical history should be obtained to rule out possible secondary causes. Treatment depends on the severity of symptoms, beginning with behavioral modification such as trigger avoidance and dietary changes for mild cases. Modification includes meals that are small, frequent, bland, dry, and high in protein. First-line pharmacologic management for mild or moderate cases is vitamin B6 with or without doxylamine. When conservative measures are ineffective or not tolerated, additional pharmacologic options include other antihistamines or dopamine antagonists. Metoclopramide and ondansetron are considered second-line treatments for persistent symptoms. Dehydration and electrolyte abnormalities should be corrected and may necessitate hospitalization if oral intake is not possible. Treatment of refractory or severe symptoms include the consideration of corticosteroids and, in rare cases, supplemental enteral or parenteral nutrition.
abstract.textZh: 噁心和嘔吐是懷孕期間最常見的症狀。 應使用妊娠獨特的嘔吐和噁心量化(PUQE)評分等工具評估嚴重程度。 在嚴重情況下，應獲得額外的病史以排除可能的次要原因。 治療取決於症狀的嚴重程度，從行為改變開始，例如輕微病例的觸發回避和飲食改變。 修飾包括少量、頻繁、平淡、乾燥和高蛋白質的餐點。 輕度或中度病例的一線藥理治療是維生素B6加或不加多西拉明。 當保守措施無效或不能耐受時，其他藥理選項包括其他抗組胺藥或多巴胺拮抗劑。 Metoclopramide和ondansetron被認為是持續症狀的第二線治療藥物。 脫水和電解質異常應予以糾正，如果無法口服，可能需要住院治療。 難治性或嚴重症狀的治療包括考慮使用皮質類固醇，在極少數情況下，考慮補充腸內或腸外營養。

articles.titleZh: 懷孕期間的噁心和嘔吐

articles.title: Metabolic Dysfunction-Associated Steatotic Liver Disease: Diagnosis and Management
articles.authors: Ohri S, Waterman E, Quiñones AR

abstract.text: Metabolic dysfunction-associated steatotic liver disease (MASLD; formerly nonalcoholic fatty liver disease) is an increasingly common cause of chronic liver disease. It is fatty infiltration of the liver with at least one cardiometabolic risk factor, without a secondary cause and no or low alcohol use. People with MASLD and other risk factors (eg, diabetes, obesity) are at higher risk for long-term adverse outcomes, including cirrhosis and hepatocellular carcinoma. Screening for advanced fibrosis involves two-step sequential noninvasive testing. Clinicians should risk stratify using the Fibrosis-4 index. Secondary risk assessment with vibration-controlled transient elastography or ultrasound-based methods is needed in people with indeterminate or high-risk Fibrosis-4 scores. Monitoring and management of earlier stages of the MASLD spectrum in primary care may reduce the risk of adverse outcomes and maximize care before specialist referral. Patients should be counseled on lifestyle interventions (eg, at least 5% weight loss for people with overweight or obesity, healthy diet, at least 150 minutes of moderate aerobic physical activity per week) to improve steatosis and lower cardiovascular risk. Additional lifestyle recommendations include smoking cessation, limited alcohol intake in people with no or mild fibrosis, and no alcohol for those with more significant fibrosis. Semaglutide and resmetirom are approved by the US Food and Drug Administration for treatment of metabolic dysfunction- associated steatohepatitis in patients with moderate or severe fibrosis.
abstract.textZh: 代謝功能障礙相關脂肪性肝病（ MASLD ；以前稱為非酒精性脂肪性肝病）是慢性肝病越來越常見的原因。 這是肝臟的脂肪浸潤，至少有一個心臟代謝危險因素，沒有次要原因，沒有或低酒精使用。 患有MASLD和其他風險因素（如糖尿病、肥胖症）的人，長期不良結果的風險較高，包括肝硬化和肝細胞癌。 晚期纖維化篩查包括兩步驟順序無創檢測。 臨牀醫生應使用Fibrosis-4指數進行風險分層。 對於不確定或高風險纖維化-4評分的人羣，需要使用振動控制的瞬態彈性成像或基於超聲波的方法進行次要風險評估。 在初級保健中監測和管理MASLD譜系的早期階段可以降低不良結果的風險，並在專科轉介之前最大限度地提高護理效果。 應建議患者採取生活方式幹預措施（例如，超重或肥胖、健康飲食、每週至少150分鐘中度有氧身體活動的人至少減重5% ） ，以改善脂肪變性和降低心血管風險。 其他生活方式建議包括戒煙、對沒有或輕度纖維化的人限制飲酒，以及對纖維化較嚴重的人禁止飲酒。 Semaglutide和resmetirom獲得美國食品和藥物管理局批準用於代謝治療

articles.titleZh: 代謝功能障礙相關脂肪性肝病：診斷與管理

articles.title: Type 2 Diabetes: Outpatient Insulin Management
articles.authors: Marrison ST, Bragg S, Tran E

abstract.text: More than 29 million adults in the United States are diagnosed with type 2 diabetes, and insulin therapy is estimated to be needed in up to 15% of cases. Insulin should be considered first-line treatment in patients with severe hyperglycemia (eg, A1C greater than 10%, blood glucose 300 mg/dL or higher), symptoms of hyperglycemia, or catabolism. To optimize insulin use in an outpatient setting, family physicians must consider strategies for initiation, titration, and adherence. The preferred starting regimen is basal insulin with stepwise intensification to prandial or premixed insulin. Insulin regimens can be titrated as frequently as every 2 to 3 days until blood glucose targets are reached. Long-acting insulin analogues offer improved duration of action and reduced risk of hypoglycemia compared with intermediate-acting insulin. Continuous glucose monitoring may improve diabetes control and can be considered in patients who need insulin. Weight gain, hypoglycemia, and insulin regimen complexity are key challenges in diabetes management. Family physicians should use individualized targets that consider life expectancy, age, medical comorbidities, and hypoglycemia risk. Insulin treatment remains a significant but complex aspect of managing type 2 diabetes.
abstract.textZh: 美國有超過2900萬成年人被診斷出患有2型糖尿病，據估計，高達15%的病例需要胰島素治療。 在患有嚴重高血糖症（例如A1C大於10%、血糖300 mg/dL或更高）、高血糖症狀或分解代謝症的患者中，應考慮使用胰島素作為一線治療。 為了在門診環境中優化胰島素的使用，家庭醫生必須考慮開始、滴定和依從性的策略。 首選的起始方案是基礎胰島素，並逐步強化為餐飲或預混合胰島素。 胰島素方案可以每2至3天滴定一次，直到達到血糖目標。 與中效胰島素相比，長效胰島素類似物可改善作用持續時間並降低低血糖風險。 持續的葡萄糖監測可以改善糖尿病控制，並且可以在需要胰島素的患者中考慮。 體重增加、低血糖和胰島素療法的複雜性是糖尿病管理的主要挑戰。 家庭醫生應使用考慮預期壽命、年齡、合併症和低血糖風險的個性化目標。 胰島素治療仍然是管理2型糖尿病的一個重要但複雜的方面。

articles.title: Recurrent UTI in Women: Diagnosis and Management
articles.authors: Zwahlen D, Ball J, Jackson Q

abstract.text: Recurrent urinary tract infection (UTI) is defined as two or more UTIs within 6 months or three or more within 1 year. The annual recurrence rate of UTI in women is approximately 14% to 25%. Risk factors for recurrent UTI include antimicrobial exposures, more frequent sexual activity, use of spermicidal agents or diaphragms, peri- or postmenopausal status, personal hygiene practices, urinary stasis from incomplete bladder emptying, pelvic organ prolapse, and voiding dysfunction. When women present with recurrent UTI symptoms, urinalysis and urine culture should be obtained. Management guidelines recommend empiric treatment with a first-line antibiotic based on prior culture results, then changing the antibiotic if the new culture shows resistance, or waiting for culture results before selecting an antibiotic. Longer duration of therapy does not reduce the risk of recurrent UTI. Asymptomatic bacteriuria should not be treated, except in patients who are pregnant or undergoing invasive urologic procedures. Prevention of recurrent UTI begins with behavioral modification and hygienic practices. The next step is prescription of antibiotic prophylaxis with shared decision-making. Nonantibiotic methods are also used to prevent recurrent UTI, and evidence of their effectiveness varies. These methods include use of cranberry products, Lactobacillus probiotics, vaginal estrogen, methenamine supplements.
abstract.textZh: 復發性泌尿道感染 (UTI) 定義為 6 個月內發生 2 次或以上泌尿道感染，或 1 年內發生 3 次或以上泌尿道感染。女性泌尿道感染的年復發率約為 14% 至 25%。復發性泌尿道感染的危險因子包括抗菌藥物暴露、更頻繁的性活動、使用殺精劑或隔膜、圍絕經期或停經後狀態、個人衛生習慣、膀胱排空不完全導致的尿瘀、骨盆器官脫垂和排尿功能障礙。當女性出現復發性泌尿道感染症狀時，應進行尿液分析和尿液培養。管理指引建議根據先前的培養結果使用第一線抗生素進行經驗性治療，然後如果新培養物顯示抗藥性則更換抗生素，或等待培養結果再選擇抗生素。較長的治療時間並不能降低復發性泌尿道感染的風險。無症狀菌尿不應接受治療，除非是懷孕或接受侵入性泌尿外科手術的患者。預防復發性泌尿道感染始於行為改變和衛生習慣。下一步是透過共同決策制定抗生素預防處方。非抗生素方法也可用於預防復發性泌尿道感染，其有效性的證據各不相同。這些方法包括使用蔓越莓產品、乳酸菌益生菌、陰道雌激素、烏洛托品補充劑。

articles.titleZh: 女性復發性泌尿道感染：診斷與治療

articles.title: Gambling Disorder: Diagnosis and Treatment
articles.authors: Kaminski DM, Naik H, Weiss DS

abstract.text: Pathologic gambling, also known as gambling disorder, is a behavioral addiction. The prevalence of gambling disorder has increased in recent years as gambling has become more accessible. Gambling disorder is often underdiagnosed and may have disabling effects on patients. Although men are more often affected, the rate of gambling disorder has been increasing in women. Risk factors include comorbid substance use disorder, mental health diagnoses, lower socioeconomic status, and participation in other risky behaviors. The US Preventive Services Task Force has not addressed screening for gambling disorders. In the United Kingdom, the National Institute for Health and Care Excellence has developed a guideline for case-finding based on expert opinion; the guideline suggests asking a direct question, such as "Do you gamble?," to assess patients for gambling disorder. The Diagnostic and Statistical Manual of Mental Disorders, 5th ed., text revision criteria should be used to confirm the diagnosis and classify severity. Pharmacologic interventions such as naltrexone or olanzapine may reduce symptom severity in the short-term, although more study is needed. Psychotherapy, including cognitive behavior therapy and motivational interviewing, offers short-term benefits; however, its long-term effectiveness is uncertain. Self-help and family support groups have limited evidence but provide safe places for affected individuals and loved ones to alleviate the stress associated with the financial and emotional consequences of gambling.
abstract.textZh: 病理性賭博，也稱為賭博障礙，是一種行為成癮。近年來，隨著賭博變得越來越容易，賭博障礙的盛行率增加。賭博障礙常常未被充分診斷​​，並可能對患者造成殘疾影響。儘管男性更容易受到賭博障礙的影響，但女性賭博障礙的比例卻在增加。危險因子包括共病物質使用疾患、心理健康診斷、較低的社經地位、參與其他危險行為。美國預防服務工作小組尚未解決賭博障礙篩檢問題。在英國，國家健康與照護卓越研究所根據專家意見制定了病例發現指南；該指南建議直接詢問「你賭博嗎？」等問題來評估患者是否患有賭博障礙。應使用《精神疾病診斷與統計手冊》第五版文字修訂標準來確認診斷並對嚴重程度進行分類。儘管還需要更多研究，但納曲酮或奧氮平等藥物幹預措施可能會在短期內減輕症狀嚴重程度。心理治療，包括認知行為治療和動機式訪談，可以提供短期益處；然而，其長期有效性尚不確定。自助和家庭支持團體的證據有限，但為受影響的個人和親人提供安全的場所，以減輕與賭博造成的經濟和情感後果相關的壓力。

articles.title: Pacemaker Therapy: Indications and Recommendations
articles.authors: Lanney H, Hu Y, Karnovsky SC

abstract.text: Pacemakers are implantable cardiac devices used in the treatment of bradycardia and heart failure. They monitor electrical signals in the heart and deliver electrical stimuli to cause contraction in the targeted heart chamber. Permanent pacemaker therapy is recommended in patients with symptomatic bradycardia or asymptomatic infranodal atrioventricular block to improve symptoms and quality of life. Biventricular pacemakers can also be used in cardiac resynchronization therapy, which corrects dyssynchrony between the ventricles. In patients who have symptomatic heart failure with reduced ejection fraction, left bundle branch block, and prolonged QRS duration, cardiac resynchronization therapy improves outcomes, including mortality. Medical procedures such as electrocautery or magnetic resonance imaging may interfere with a patient's pacemaker; family physicians should coordinate with cardiologists to ensure appropriate care for patients in whom these procedures are indicated.
abstract.textZh: 心律調節器是用於治療心搏過緩和心臟衰竭的植入式心臟裝置。它們監測心臟中的電信號並傳遞電刺激以引起目標心室收縮。對於有症狀的心搏過緩或無症狀的結下房室傳導阻滯的患者，建議使用永久性心律調節器治療，以改善症狀和生活品質。雙心室節律器也可用於心臟再同步治療，矯正心室之間的不同步。對於有射血分數降低、左束支傳導阻滯和 QRS 持續時間延長的症狀性心臟衰竭的患者，心臟再同步治療可改善預後，包括死亡率。電燒或磁振造影等醫療程序可能會幹擾患者的心律調節器；家庭醫生應與心臟科醫師協調，確保為需要進行這些手術的患者提供適當的護理。

articles.titleZh: 心律調節器治療：適應症與建議

articles.title: The Importance of Primary Care Subject Matter Experts: Output Quality in Large Language Models Prompt Engineering
articles.authors: Liaw W, Hung Bui Q, Adepoju O, Van Nguyen H

abstract.text: Large language models (LLMs) offer new opportunities to support primary care by generating documentation, summarizing records, answering messages, and providing education. While LLMs show promise, their effectiveness depends on how well their outputs align with real-world clinical needs. This commentary describes one team's development of Primary Care (PC) Navigator, a multimodal artificial intelligence (AI) tool that combines audio and video from clinical encounters with an LLM to generate behavior change plans. Our pilot study showed that prompt design plays a critical role in shaping output quality. Through collaboration between clinicians and engineers, we created more effective prompts and recommend that others use the CARE framework (Context, Action, Result, Example) to ensure the outputs are accurate, relevant, and actionable. Clinician involvement is essential not just for evaluating the LLM's performance, but also for shaping its development. By participating in prompt engineering, clinicians move from passive users to co-developers. Their input ensures that LLMs in primary care are both technically functional and aligned with patient needs, professional values, and the realities of frontline practice.
abstract.textZh: 大語言模型 (LLM) 透過產生文件、總結記錄、回覆訊息和提供教育，為支援初級保健提供了新的機會。雖然法學碩士表現出希望，但其有效性取決於其產出與現實臨床需求的契合程度。這篇評論描述了一個團隊開發的初級保健 (PC) Navigator，這是一種多模式人工智慧 (AI) 工具，它將臨床遇到的音訊和視訊與法學碩士結合起來，以產生行為改變計劃。我們的試點研究表明，即時設計在塑造輸出品質方面發揮關鍵作用。透過臨床醫生和工程師之間的合作，我們創建了更有效的提示，並建議其他人使用 CARE 框架（上下文、行動、結果、範例），以確保輸出準確、相關且可操作。臨床醫師的參與不僅對於評估法學碩士的表現至關重要，而且對於塑造其發展也至關重要。透過參與即時工程，臨床醫生從被動用戶轉變為共同開發者。他們的意見確保初級保健領域的法學碩士既具有技術功能，又符合患者需求、專業價值觀和第一線實踐的現實。

articles.titleZh: 初級保健主題專家的重要性：大型語言模型的輸出品質提示工程

articles.title: Daily Nutrient Intake and Inflammation Among US Adults
articles.authors: Mainous AG, Yin L, Orlando FA, Saguil AA

abstract.label: INTRODUCTION
abstract.text: Systemic inflammation has long been associated with chronic disease and mortality. Dietary interventions have been a proposed mechanism to decrease inflammation. Using high-sensitivity C-reactive protein (hs-CRP) as a marker of inflammation, we investigated whether daily intake of nutrients purported to be anti-inflammatory had an association with current inflammation.
abstract.textZh: 長期以來，全身性發炎一直與慢性疾病和死亡有關。飲食幹預已被提議為減少發炎的機制。我們使用高敏感 C 反應蛋白 (hs-CRP) 作為發炎標記物，研究了每日攝取的抗發炎營養素是否與目前發炎有關。

abstract.label: METHODS
abstract.text: We used the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey 2021-2023 to conduct a population level analysis of US adults. Individual diets were translated into daily nutrient intakes. hs-CRP was measured in close temporal proximity to dietary assessment. For each nutrient, intake was categorized as low, moderate (includes recommended intake), or high. hs-CRP and dietary nutrient intake were examined with parametric and non-parametric statistics.
abstract.textZh: 我們利用 2021-2023 年國家健康和營養檢查調查對美國成年人進行了人口層面分析。個人飲食被轉化為每日營養攝取量。 hs-CRP 的測量時間與飲食評估非常接近。對於每種營養素，攝取量分為低、中（包括建議攝取量）或高。透過參數和非參數統計檢查 hs-CRP 和膳食營養素攝取量。

abstract.label: RESULTS
abstract.text: High intake of certain nutrients was significantly associated with lower levels of hs-CRP when compared to low intake of these nutrients (dietary fiber: 2.7 vs. 3.9, p=0.001; folate: 3.3 vs. 4.1, p=0.002; magnesium: 2.8 vs. 4.0, p=0.001; vitamin B6: 3.4 vs. 4.0, p=0.01; vitamin C: 3.4 vs. 4.0, p=0.04; vitamin D: 1.3 vs. 3.8, p=0.03; vitamin K: 3.1 vs. 4.1, p=0.0001). For dietary fiber and magnesium, the significant association was also demonstrated when comparing low to moderate intake. Not all hypothesized nutrients showed significant associations with inflammation.
abstract.textZh: 與低攝取量相比，某些營養素的高攝取量與較低的 hs-CRP 水平顯著相關（膳食纖維：2.7 vs. 3.9，p=0.001；葉酸：3.3 vs. 4.1，p=0.002；鎂：2.8 vs. 4.0，p=0.001； 4.0，p=0.04；維生素 D：1.3 與 3.8，p=0.03；維生素 K：3.1 與 4.1，p=0.0001）。對於膳食纖維和鎂，在比較低攝取量和中等攝取量時也證明了顯著關聯。並非所有假設的營養素都與發炎有顯著相關。

abstract.label: CONCLUSION
abstract.text: Usual dietary intake of dietary fiber and magnesium indicate that they are anti-inflammatory. Folate, and vitamins B6, C, D, and K appear to confer greater anti-inflammatory benefit only above recommended dietary levels. Dietary strategies emphasizing these nutrients may help individuals lower hs-CRP and potentially mitigate inflammation-related health risks.
abstract.textZh: 日常飲食中攝取的膳食纖維和鎂表明它們具有抗發炎作用。葉酸和維生素 B6、C、D 和 K 似乎僅在高於建議的膳食水平時才具有更大的抗炎功效。強調這些營養素的飲食策略可能有助於個體降低 hs-CRP，並有可能減輕與發炎相關的健康風險。

articles.titleZh: 美國成年人的每日營養攝取量和炎症
